channel.title: NE on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NE on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Dakota County Sheriff’s Office (NE)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Dakota County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: June 9, 2020 County: Dakota County State: NE FIPS: 31043

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: PEN-LINK, LTD — ICE LANCASTER, NE $19,735,670
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PEN-LINK, LTD Award ID: 70CMSD22C00000001 Amount: $19,735,669.92 Description: FOR PEN-LINK SOFTWARE SUITE FOR 500 USERS, TRAINING, MAINTENANCE AND SUPPORT AND ENGINEERING SERVICES Period: 2022-07-01 to 2026-06-30 Location: LANCASTER, NE (FIPS: 31109)

item.title: PEN-LINK, LTD — ICE LANCASTER, NE $2,284,750
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PEN-LINK, LTD Award ID: 70CMSD25P00000138 Amount: $2,284,750.00 Description: THIS AWARD PROVIDES ICE HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS WITH PENLINKS COBWEB AND TANGLES LICENSES TO GATHER OPEN-SOURCE INFORMATION FOR HSI CRIMINAL INVESTIGATIONS. Period: 2025-09-25 to 2026-09-24 Location: LANCASTER, NE (FIPS: 31109)

item.title: PEN-LINK, LTD — ICE LANCASTER, NE $9,819,193
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PEN-LINK, LTD Award ID: HSCETE11C00001 Amount: $9,819,192.95 Description: PEN-LINK SOFTWARE SITE LICENSES FOR BASE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE 7/1/11-6/30/12, PLUS 4 OPTION PERIODS. Period: 2011-07-29 to 2016-06-30 Location: LANCASTER, NE (FIPS: 31109)

item.title: Sarpy County Jail — Sarpy, NE
item.description:
